title: Family House – 4380
fullText: Family House – 4380 code number: 4380 5 rooms4 bedrooms2 bathrooms800 m² plot size153 m² living area Situated in valuable area in the spa town of Hévíz is this detached house completely refurbished in the year 2015 for sale. The house comprises 3 storeys, and it is characterized by a very good layout. The ground floor comes with a large kitchen, a sitting room and a bedroom with bathroom and toilet, the first floor comes with two bedrooms, a bathroom + toilet, a walk-in wardrobe and a hall. The attic floor was converted into a room. The property is also endowed with a cellar and a garage. The lot is nicely landscaped and tended. The thermal lake is only 1000 metres away. The house is heated via gas central heating. This property is fit for use as a permanent residence. All the furniture are included in the purche price. Garage 25 sqm, cellar 25 sqm. First floor: bedroom, bedroom, walk-in wardrobe, bathroom +toilet, hall. Attic floor: bedroom. Fixtures: • Electricity, gas, water and drainage mains, air conditioners, internet, tv-aerials, cable tv, entry phone, alarm system are available. • Heating system: gas fuelled central heating. • Plastic windows with insulating panes, fitted with rolling blinds. • Floor coverings: ceramic tiles, laminate parquet. • The lot is fenced off. Description of the settlement: Hévíz has unrivalled natural endowments: the world famous thermal lake operates all year round and eases the rheumatic pain of millions of people. Outstanding cafés, cinemas, restaurants and massage centres await their visitors. Many buses run from the bus terminal on a daily basis to Budapest and the nearby larger towns.
